title: An exhaust hood with a projector
abstract: The present invention relates to an exhaust hood (1) that is positioned above a cooker (A) so that there is a distance between the exhaust hood (1) and the cooker (A), the exhaust hood (1) comprising a casing (2), a projector (3) that is disposed in the casing (2), that projects the images that are preloaded by the producer to a surface, enabling the user to enter information through the transmitted image and enabling the cooker (A) to be controlled in accordance with the information entered, and at least one filter (4) through which the air sucked from the environment passes.
claims: Claims ( 8 ) An exhaust hood (1) that is positioned above a cooker (A) so that there is a distance between the exhaust hood (1) and the cooker (A), the exhaust hood (1) comprising a casing (2), a projector (3) that is disposed in the casing (2), that projects the images that are preloaded by the producer to a surface, enabling the user to enter information through the transmitted image and enabling the cooker (A) to be controlled in accordance with the information entered, and at least one filter (4) through which the air sucked from the environment passes, characterized by at least one lamp (5) that is disposed into the casing (2) so as to remain behind the filter (4) at one side of the filter (4) with the projector (3) being disposed at the other side thereof. An exhaust hood (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by the filter (4) in front of which the projector (3) is disposed and behind which the lamp (5) is disposed. An exhaust hood (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by the lamp (5) that is disposed almost at the same level with the projector (3). An exhaust hood (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by an opening (6) arranged directly below the position of the lamp (5) so as to enable the light emitted by the lamp (5) to reach the cooker (A). An exhaust hood (1) as in Claim 4, characterized by an opaque lid (7) covering the opening (6). An exhaust hood (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by a support (8) that is disposed into the casing (2) almost parallel to the cooker (A) and whereon the lamps (5) are disposed. An exhaust hood (1) as in Claim 6, characterized by the support (8) that is in form of a plate produced from sheet metal. An exhaust hood (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the opening (6) and the lid (7) that are disposed at the region where the filter (4) is closest to the rear wall of the casing (2) and by the lamp (5) that is disposed at the region where the filter (4) surface is farthest from the rear wall of the casing (2).
